full_text:
Wang Yue 王悦
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yue (王悦). Sister of Wang Tao. She and her sister were defeated by Guan Suo and became his secondary wives. Wang Yue is a fictional character. Wang Yue was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
